reviews.review_description: Seemed like a cool idea when it worked earlier but now just fails to launch.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

We are very sorry, we have been preparing a major update for a long time, which should make the game more lively. A complete new menu and game system, and later levels will be added, similar to our new game called RC Trucks, which is the same concept with better development.

Alternative Team.

reviews.review_title: Big potential, but lots of bugs
reviews.review_description: Please fix the control settings for the helikopter. The helicopter only goes up, never down again. Trying to change button configuration in settings does not work, is broken. Also in freestyle with helicopter the room shows the 3D lines all around, it is bad. The drones seem to work fine. With a couple of fixes it would definitely a game to recommend, but as it is now is not worth it.

reviews.review_title: Fix controls and it will be  worthwhile
reviews.review_description: It’s an ok app at best. The graphics in mixed reality are good. But as a real life rc heli pilot this falls short. If they fix the controls (put throttle control on left joystick)and make rotation a little less  sensitive it would be pretty good. As of now…So close but yet so far.
It is a great game worth more than 3$
This handles just like my drone flying around!  I can even fly it outside and it looks very real.  I plan to use this to help hone my flight skills without breaking my drone.  Thanks to the Dev!

Ignore negative reviews. The game worked perfectly and is awesome. I can’t take my headset off. They are a bit difficult to control but once you slow it down and have a little bit of practice you’ll be a professional pilot in no time. 10/10 would recommend.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your positive feedback. We appreciate it very much and I hope that you will be happy that we are currently developing aircrafts, which will be added in the next update, as well as the helicopter control adjustments.

reviews.review_description: This is a decent RC helicopter simulation in mixed reality. Just make sure the launch pad is not blocked by an object and it works fine. Really cool game but will take a fair amount of practice which is expected. For the money an easy five stars and highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the awesome review! We're really happy you’re enjoying the experience. A bit of practice definitely pays off! 🚁 Thanks for the recommendation and for flying with us!

reviews.review_title: Really fun right from the start
reviews.review_description:
Really enjoy this app, made funny videos of 
my helicopter flying thru people in the room.

developer_response.body: Glad you're having fun right from the start! 😄 Making funny videos sounds awesome — thanks for sharing your experience and for playing!

reviews.review_description: A good start for flying RC Helicopter...if a button or trigger could always point the nose to a home position...I believe controlling the Helicopter would be so much easier...this flying sim has  Great potential... The options are endless with missions or putting out fires or picking up people or doing all kinds of things this could be a great game...hope this helps the  Development team

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, we appreciate it. The Simulator is still under development and any feedback of this type helps us in their improvement and bringing new minigames. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: Total garbage.  Didn’t work at all on my Meta Quest 3.  Only made an odd buzzing sound.

developer_response.body: The game has spatial depth perception, so it is possible that the helicopter is hiding behind a real object.

reviews.review_title: The controls where not how I’m used
reviews.review_description: I have a few rc helicopters but these controls are not like i’m used to yet. I would buy this game as it because customisable and there are some mini games like flying to hoops or picking up passengers or shooting down other choppers

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We will improve the controls in the next update. And what Quest model did you play this game on ?
